displayTitle: Tales of the Jedi #2: Ulic Qel-Droma and the Beast Wars of Onderon, Part 2
synopsis: Tales of the Jedi 2 is the second issue in the Tales of the Jedi series of comics. It was published on November 15, 1993 by Dark Horse Comics.
title: Tales of the Jedi #2: Ulic Qel-Droma and the Beast Wars of Onderon, Part 2
